pages.title: Monaco – The first revenue engine for startups
pages.description: Monaco is the first revenue engine for startups. The AI native platform replaces legacy CRM and disparate sales point solutions, acting as the all-in-one revenue platform and system of record that builds your TAM, runs outbound, captures every interaction, and manages pipeline in one place.
h1: The first revenue engine for startups
h2: Everything you need, all in one place

pages.title: Product | Monaco – Everything you need, all in one place
pages.description: Monaco is the all-in-one revenue platform and system of record. One unified platform for database, signals, sequences, pipeline tracking, call recording and more, where every interaction is captured from demand generation to pipeline conversion so your system runs itself.
h2: Your TAM is built and improved for you
Segment with AI, prioritize with signals
pages.text_sample: Product | Monaco – Everything you need, all in one place Product Company Log in Request demo Open menu Monaco customers grow revenue faster Request demo 1 Build TAM Drive Demand 2 Overlay signals Drive Demand 3 Execute sequences Drive Demand 4 Capture Activity Increase Conversion 5 Track Pipeline Increase Conversion 6 Ask Monaco Increase Conversion 1 Build TAM • Drive Demand Your TAM is built and improved for you Your Monaco account is pre-built with your entire TAM on Day 1. Your TAM is automatically updated and improved over time as your company grows. Pre-built TAM Monaco automatically builds your TAM from a world database of billions of data points. Grounded in your ICP Your TAM is shaped from your ICP, your existing customers, and the accounts already in your email history. AI scoring Built-in ML scoring using firmographics and signals with clear "why this account" explanations. 2 Overlay signals • Drive Demand Segment with AI, prioritize with signals Monaco overlays custom signal

pages.title: Company – Monaco revenue engine for startups
pages.description: Monaco solves go-to-market risk for founders without sales backgrounds. Investors including Garry Tan, Peter Thiel and Ryan Petersen back Monaco as the AI native revenue engine that helps every founder grow revenue faster.
h1: Designed for companies that intend to succeed
h2: World-class products deserve a world-class revenue engine
The right team to build this business, and yours
pages.text_sample: Company – Monaco revenue engine for startups Product Company Log in Request demo Open menu Designed for companies that intend to succeed Built by operators who've scaled startups before. World-class products deserve a world-class revenue engine That's what we believe in. And after decades of watching startups fail at acquiring customers, we built the system to make it true. Monaco exists so founders can focus on product while revenue scales itself. Founders The right team to build this business, and yours Sam Blond Co-Founder & CEO Fmr. CRO Brex, Zenefits Brian Blond Co-Founder Fmr. MD Sutter Hill, Partner at Human cap Malay Desai Co-Founder & CTO Fmr. Chief Architect & SVP of Eng at Clari Shek Viswanathan Co-Founder & CPO Fmr. CPO at Apollo & Qualtrics Backed by top-tier investors “ AI is changing the way startups grow revenue. Monaco will chart the path. ” Sam Blond Co-Founder & CEO, Monaco Join our team Open Roles Product Company Log in Request demo System Status Compliance & Trust

pages.text_sample: Privacy | Monaco Product Company Log in Request demo Open menu Monaco Privacy Notice Last Updated: December 30, 2025 This Privacy Notice applies to the processing of personal information by Irwin, Inc. d/b/a Monaco ("Monaco," "we," "us," or "our") including on our website available at https://monaco.com/ , our mobile application, and our other online or offline offerings that link to, or are otherwise subject to, this Privacy Notice (collectively, the "Services"). Disclosure Regarding Customer Data. This Privacy Notice does not apply to the personal information that our customers independently provide to us about their leads, prospects, customers, and other business contacts pursuant to a written agreement we have entered into with such customers ("Customer Data"). Examples of Customer Data that we may process on behalf of our customers may include: CRM and Email Inbox Data: Our customers may provide us with personal information from their CRM systems and email inboxes. pages.title: Security | Monaco
pages.description: Monaco's vulnerability disclosure policy — how to report security issues responsibly.
pages.text_sample: Security | Monaco Product Company Log in Request demo Open menu Security Policy Monaco takes the security of our customers' data seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in any Monaco product or service, we'd like to hear from you. Reporting a Vulnerability Email security@monaco.com , or submit a report through our vulnerability disclosure form . For sensitive reports, please encrypt your message using our PGP key: Fingerprint: 54FC 7122 1433 4900 FE9F 2921 BAB2 7553 F3F9 A8B7 Download: keys.openpgp.org Please include: A description of the issue and its potential impact Steps to reproduce (proof-of-concept, screenshots, affected URLs) Any relevant logs or request/response captures Your name or handle, if you'd like public credit Scope In scope: www.monaco.com — marketing and landing site app.monaco.com — Monaco web application api.monaco.com — Monaco public API Out of scope: Third-party services we integrate with — please report to them directly Social engineer

pages.title: Vulnerability Disclosure | Monaco
pages.description: Submit a security vulnerability report to Monaco through our coordinated disclosure program.
pages.text_sample: Vulnerability Disclosure | Monaco Product Company Log in Request demo Open menu Submit a Vulnerability Report Found a security issue in a Monaco product? We want to hear about it. Submissions are handled through our disclosure program on HackerOne — reports are triaged by Monaco's security team. Before submitting, please review our security policy for scope, safe harbor terms, and our response commitments. Submit a report on HackerOne Prefer email? You can also reach us at security@monaco.com . For sensitive reports, encrypt with our PGP key (fingerprint 54FC 7122 1433 4900 FE9F 2921 BAB2 7553 F3F9 A8B7 ). ‹ Monaco Security Policy Product Company Log in Request demo System Status Compliance & Trust Privacy Terms Security Vulnerability Disclosure Copyright © 2026 Monaco. All rights reserved.
